# Synthetic Fixture: Identity Evidence

Document marker: 신원 확인 자료 / 법인등기 요약
Subject: [DEBTOR_PERSON]
Organization: [DEBTOR_ORG]
Identity key evidence:
- normalized name token: [NAME_TOKEN]
- birth date token: [DATE_TOKEN]
- registration status: active organization
- representative role: [ROLE_REDACTED]

Evidence summary:
- Identity facts support party resolution but are not enough for case merge alone.
- Raw identity numbers, addresses, phones, and registration extracts are omitted.
- The fixture intentionally keeps only field labels and safe placeholders.
